items.title: Profile source revision
items.finding: All 16 PRV items are implemented in four 0.2.0-draft.1 Profile sources.

items.title: Profile source tests
items.finding: Sixteen source-revision tests are executed and passed.

items.title: Profile Internal Review Round 2
items.finding: Four Profiles and 32 dimensions are reviewed: 28 Pass, 0 Revise, 4 external-review Blocked.

items.title: Affected-person review instruments
items.finding: Seven track guides and one session record exist and remain unexecuted.

items.title: Safeguards and prohibited-collection boundary
items.finding: Voluntariness, assent, withdrawal, deletion, accessibility, stop, and restricted-evidence rules exist.

items.title: Responsible role assignment
items.finding: Eight operational roles are defined but no real assignee or conflict check exists.

items.title: Protocol approvals
items.finding: Seven operational protocols have not been approved by assigned accountable roles.

items.title: Restricted evidence environment
items.finding: Storage, access, contact separation, retention, deletion, and incident logging are not provisioned.

items.title: Jurisdiction and professional qualification
items.finding: No qualified reviewer has approved a jurisdiction and operating context.

items.title: Role assignment and conflict protocol
items.finding: Accepted protocol and machine registry exist; no assignment is fabricated.

items.title: Human-use approval separation
items.finding: Synthetic-use design review is separated from real human-use approval.

items.title: Restricted evidence environment specification
items.finding: Live controls are fully specified while provisioning remains blocked.

items.title: Controlled pilot classification
items.finding: CP0 and CP1 are authorized; CP2 and CP3 remain blocked.

items.title: Synthetic pilot execution
items.finding: Twelve synthetic scenarios passed with zero real evidence and live action.

requires: All operational roles assigned to named accountable people
Restricted evidence environment provisioned and tested
Independent facilitator assigned for applicable tracks
